final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 3×3 grid poster design for Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) female wellness lifestyle content, designed to be sliced into 9 individual square posts.

Style/medium: clean editorial infographic design, soft ins-style aesthetic, gentle lifestyle magazine layout, light skeuomorphic illustrations, professional social media graphic design
Composition: 3×3 grid layout (3 columns × 3 rows), clear grid boundaries with visible spacing between cells, each cell centered and self-contained, 3:4 vertical aspect ratio overall
Subject: sleep wellness tips poster series with soft bedding, moon, pillow, eye mask, warm milk, aromatherapy, books, curtains, bed elements as decorative accents
Scene/backdrop: cream white and oat beige base, warm minimalist backdrop with subtle texture, cozy bedroom atmosphere
Lighting/mood: soft diffused warm light, calming and healing mood, gentle and soothing atmosphere
Color palette: cream white, light beige, pale oat, soft caramel as dominant tones with dark brown text accents, warm and healing color harmony
Materials/textures: matte paper texture, soft fabric surfaces, gentle gradients, clean vector illustrations with subtle depth
Text (verbatim): "让你倒头就睡的8个 tips" / "失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏" / "1. 睡前1小时别玩手机" / "蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。" / "2. 睡前把灯光调暗" / "暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。" / "3. 房间温度别太高" / "稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。" / "4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡" / "咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。" / "5. 睡前洗个热水澡" / "能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。" / "6. 脑子停不下来就写下来" / "把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。" / "7. 固定上床时间" / "每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。" / "8. 试试深呼吸放松法" / "吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。" / "收藏这组，今晚试试看"
Constraints: all 9 cells must have clear borders for clean slicing; each cell must work as standalone Xiaohongshu post; large readable Chinese text only; generous white space; no text near grid lines
Avoid: cheap marketing aesthetic, over-decorated busy layouts, small unreadable text, English text, garbled characters, cluttered compositions, aggressive sales vibe, neon colors, harsh contrasts
